Contact sales
The OS for
human-agent
teams
Supercharge your teams to get things done
Get started
View demo
85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana¹
AI that works the way your team works
Asana Work Graph®
A neural network of everything your company is doing, every person, task, project, goal, and dependency connected, so humans and agents always know who is doing what, by when, and toward which goal.
Multiplayer
Every workflow, app, and agent runs in a shared space where humans and agents act on the same plan, see the same context, and get smarter with every interaction. Multiple humans can train, guide, and improve any agent.
Shared memory
Shared memory means AI Teammates learn from the work itself. Every completed task, every piece of feedback, every preference gets carried forward, so no one repeats context they've already given and every workflow starts smarter than the last.
Enterprise governance
Every agent has an identity, scoped permissions, an audit trail, and cost constraints, with data access, approved actions, and spend all managed from the same console that governs human users.
AI Teammates
Your team just got bigger
Pre-built AI agents that work alongside your team inside real workflows, with shared memory, governance, and context from the Work Graph, so they are ready to go on day one.
Learn more

Turns project goals into step-by-step timelines so you can hit every deadline without the constant coordination.

Agentic Work Management
Agentic Work Management brings together AI Teammates, AI Studio, Asana Dash, and MCP and AI Connectors — so your team and your agents run critical workflows together.
Learn more

One AI-native enterprise service management platform for IT, HR, facilities, and legal.
Learn more

Learn more

Learn more

Learn more

Simone Williams

Privacy
Privacy
Download the Asana iOS app
Download the Asana Android app
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.
Cookies Details

Contact sales
Get started

Contact sales
Pick the plan that fits your team
Monthly
Yearly
Save up to 18%
Personal
For one or two people managing personal projects.
$0
Free forever
Get started
Manage tasks and personal to-dos:
check icon
2 users
Up to 2 users can collaborate for free. Great for individuals or small teams starting out with Asana.
check icon
Unlimited tasks and projects
Organize your work with unlimited tasks and projects. Tasks keep your to-dos on track; projects bring them together around bigger goals.
check icon
List, board, and calendar views
Visualize your work your way. Switch between a structured task list, a kanban-style board, or a calendar view  — all in one project.
check icon
Unlimited storage, 100MB max per file
Store an unlimited number of files, each up to 100MB in size, directly within Asana.
check icon
Status updates
Keep everyone informed by sharing regular progress updates on your projects, highlighting what's been accomplished and what's coming up.
check icon
Time tracking with integrations
Connect Asana to your favorite time tracking tools so you can see exactly how long tasks take and plan more accurately.
check icon
100+ free integrations
Connect Asana with the apps your team already uses, from Slack and Google Drive to Zoom and more.
Starter
For growing teams that need to track their projects' progress and hit deadlines.
$10.99
Per user, per month billed annually
Get started
Purchase now
arrow-right-circle icon
Everything in Personal, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/50K credits per billing account per month
check icon
No user seat limits
Add as many team members as you need without hitting a cap or paying extra per person.
check icon
Timeline and Gantt views
Timeline provides a clean, simplified scheduling view, while Gantt offers detailed project management features like task hierarchy and progress tracking.
check icon
Reporting dashboards
Get a visual overview of your project's progress with charts and metrics that show how your work is tracking toward goals.
check icon
Unlimited automations
Create as many automated rules as you need to handle assignments, notifications, and status updates automatically.
check icon
Forms
Collect information and requests through customizable forms that feed directly into Asana projects.
check icon
Custom templates
Create reusable templates tailored to your team's processes for consistent project setup.
check icon
Custom fields
Add extra details to your tasks like priority levels, budgets, or approval status to track the information that matters most to your team.
check icon
Unlimited free guests
Invite external collaborators to work on projects without incurring additional costs or impacting your user count.
Advanced
For companies that need to manage a portfolio of work and goals across departments.
$24.99
Per user, per month billed annually
Get started
Purchase now
arrow-right-circle icon
Everything in Starter, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/75K credits per billing account per month
check icon
Unlimited portfolios
In Asana, a portfolio is a digital folder that organizes multiple projects in one place, giving a high-level view of your progress.
check icon
Goals
Asana goals help you track progress on what matters most by connecting your everyday tasks to bigger company-wide objectives.
check icon
Workload
Check workload just for the projects in a single portfolio—perfect for keeping one program or initiative on track.
check icon
Approvals and proofing
Annotate designs and PDFs directly in Asana and set up approval workflows to ensure every project is authorized and ready to go.
check icon
Salesforce, Tableau, Power BI support
Connect your project data with CRM and business intelligence tools, including Salesforce, Tableau, and Power BI, to get unified reporting and insights across all your workstreams,
check icon
Forms branching & customization
Build dynamic forms that show different questions based on what people answer, so you get exactly the information you need.
check icon
Time tracking
Compare estimated vs. actual time spent on tasks to gauge true effort and sharpen planning, forecasting, and budgeting.
check icon
Scaled security
Enterprise-grade controls to manage access, protect data, and keep your organization secure at scale.
check icon
Formulas
Asana formulas are custom fields that automatically calculate values like project duration, budgets, and costs using data from your tasks and projects.
Enterprise
For companies that need to coordinate and automate complex work across departments, without limits.
Contact sales for pricing
Contact sales
Everything in Advanced, plus:
asana-intelligence-sparkle icon
AI Studio Basic w/200K credits per billing account per month
check icon
SAML authentication
Connect Asana to your company's single sign-on system for centralized access control.
check icon
User provisioning (SCIM)
Automatically add new employees and then remove access when they leave the company, saving you time while keeping data secure
check icon
Universal workload
See everyone’s workload across all projects and portfolios—great for balancing resources across the whole organization.
check icon
Capacity planning
See team capacity, rebalance work, and stop burnout before deadlines slip.
check icon
Service accounts
Service accounts let apps and integrations automatically access Asana data for bulk operations without needing a real person's login credentials.
check icon
View-only licenses
Include more people in projects at lower cost by giving some users visibility without editing permissions.
check icon
Guest invite permissions
Control who can invite external people to your projects.
check icon
Project admin controls
Give limited project admin rights to trusted team members so you can keep your main workspace settings secure and prevent unwanted changes.
check icon
Admin announcements
Send organization-wide messages to all users from the admin console.
check icon
Workflow bundles
Apply standardized workflows across multiple projects or teams for consistency.
Enterprise+ plan available for increased security and compliance
Choose Enterprise+ for advanced security, compliance, and governance controls—like SIEM integrations, data residency, audit logs, and managed workspaces.
Personal
For one or two people managing personal projects.
$0
Free forever

Facebook

Terms
Terms
&
Privacy
Privacy
Download the Asana iOS app
Download the Asana Android app
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.
Cookies Details

Cookie List

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. They also provide us with auditing, research, and reporting to know when advertising content has been displayed and how successful the content has been. This information allows us and our third-party advertising providers to display relevant advertising content.

analysis.name: Asana
analysis.value_proposition: AI-native work management platform where humans and AI agents collaborate on projects via a shared Work Graph
analysis.ideal_customer: cross-functional teams at enterprises coordinating projects, workflows, and AI agents across departments

features.name: tasks
features.description: Unlimited tasks to track work items
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited tasks and projects

features.name: projects
features.description: Unlimited projects grouping tasks around goals
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited tasks and projects

features.name: list view
features.description: Structured task list view
features.evidence_quote: List, board, and calendar views

features.name: board view
features.description: Kanban-style board view
features.evidence_quote: List, board, and calendar views

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar view of tasks and projects
features.evidence_quote: List, board, and calendar views

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Simplified scheduling view
features.evidence_quote: Timeline provides a clean, simplified scheduling view

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Detailed Gantt with task hierarchy and progress tracking
features.evidence_quote: Gantt offers detailed project management features like task hierarchy and progress tracking

features.name: file storage
features.description: Unlimited file storage up to 100MB per file
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited storage, 100MB max per file

features.name: status updates
features.description: Regular project progress updates
features.evidence_quote: Keep everyone informed by sharing regular progress updates

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Time tracking via integrations
features.evidence_quote: Time tracking with integrations

features.name: integrations
features.description: 100+ free integrations with common apps
features.evidence_quote: 100+ free integrations

features.name: reporting dashboards
features.description: Visual charts and metrics for project progress
features.evidence_quote: Reporting dashboards

features.name: automations
features.description: Unlimited automated rules for assignments, notifications, updates
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited automations

features.name: forms
features.description: Customizable forms feeding into Asana projects
features.evidence_quote: Collect information and requests through customizable forms

features.name: custom templates
features.description: Reusable project templates
features.evidence_quote: Create reusable templates tailored to your team's processes

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Add priority, budget, approval fields to tasks
features.evidence_quote: Add extra details to your tasks like priority levels, budgets

features.name: guest users
features.description: Unlimited free external collaborators
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited free guests

features.name: portfolios
features.description: Digital folder organizing multiple projects with high-level view
features.evidence_quote: a portfolio is a digital folder that organizes multiple projects

features.name: goals
features.description: Track progress connecting tasks to company objectives
features.evidence_quote: Asana goals help you track progress on what matters most

features.name: workload management
features.description: Team workload view for capacity planning
features.evidence_quote: Check workload just for the projects in a single portfolio

features.name: ai teammates
features.description: Pre-built AI agents working alongside teams in workflows
features.evidence_quote: Pre-built AI agents that work alongside your team inside real workflows

features.name: ai studio
features.description: No-code automations powered by AI
features.evidence_quote: AI Studio - Powerful no-code automations

features.name: asana dash
features.description: AI chief-of-staff assistant
features.evidence_quote: Asana Dash - Your AI Chief of Staff

features.name: work graph
features.description: Neural network connecting people, tasks, projects, goals, dependencies
features.evidence_quote: A neural network of everything your company is doing

features.name: shared memory
features.description: AI teammates learn from completed work and feedback
features.evidence_quote: AI Teammates learn from the work itself

features.name: agent governance
features.description: Identity, scoped permissions, audit trail for AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Every agent has an identity, scoped permissions, an audit trail, and cost constraints

features.name: mcp connectors
features.description: MCP and AI connectors for workflows
features.evidence_quote: MCP and AI Connectors

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android mobile apps
features.evidence_quote: Asana Android and iOS mobile apps

features.name: admin console
features.description: Central admin console for users and agents
features.evidence_quote: managed from the same console that governs human users

features.name: audit logs
